mapper.select:
select a.agent_id, a.owner_user_id, a.sys_user_id, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.phonenumber, a.email, a.commission_rate, a.partner_customer_key, a.api_key, a.status, a.remark, a.create_by, a.create_time, count(u.usage_id) as usage_count, coalesce(sum(u.data_count), 0) as data_count, coalesce(sum(u.spend), 0) as total_spend, max(u.reported_at) as last_report_time from agent_client a left join agent_usage u on u.agent_id = a.agent_id
a.sys_user_id in
#{userId}
1 = 0
and (a.user_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.nick_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
group by a.agent_id order by a.agent_id desc
select agent_id, owner_user_id, sys_user_id from agent_client

select agent_id, owner_user_id, sys_user_id, user_name, password_hash, nick_name, phonenumber, email, commission_rate, partner_customer_key, api_key, api_secret_hash, status, remark, create_by, create_time from agent_client where api_key = #{apiKey} limit 1

select agent_id, owner_user_id, sys_user_id, user_name, password_hash, nick_name, phonenumber, email, commission_rate, partner_customer_key, api_key, api_secret_hash, status, remark, create_by, create_time from agent_client where sys_user_id = #{sysUserId} limit 1
select role_id from sys_role where role_key = 'agent' and status = '0' limit 1
select count(1) from agent_client where owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} and user_name = #{userName}
select count(1) from agent_client where lower(partner_customer_key) = lower(#{partnerCustomerKey})
mapper.insert: insert into agent_client(owner_user_id, sys_user_id, user_name, password_hash, nick_name, phonenumber, email, commission_rate, partner_customer_key, api_key, api_secret_hash, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{ownerUserId}, #{sysUserId}, #{userName}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickName}, #{phonenumber}, #{email}, #{commissionRate}, #{partnerCustomerKey}, #{apiKey}, #{apiSecretHash}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())

insert ignore into agent_usage(agent_id, request_id, metric, data_count, spend, currency, customer_key, reported_at, remark, create_time) values(#{agentId}, #{requestId}, #{metric}, #{dataCount}, #{spend}, #{currency}, #{customerKey}, #{reportedAt}, #{remark}, sysdate())
